name: create_drive_file
description: Create a new file (any type) in the operator's Google Drive. Supply a name and mimeType; optionally seed it with inline text content (uploaded as media). Returns the new file's id, name, mimeType, and a shareable webViewLink.

mime_type.description: The file's MIME type, e.g. 'text/plain', 'text/csv', 'application/json', or 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' to create a folder.

content.description: Optional. Inline text content to upload as the file body (UTF-8). Omit for an empty file or a folder.

operator.description: Optional. If omitted, resolves to the BlackBox's current operator (single operator auto-selected; otherwise the system default). Do not hard-code an operator name.

returns: JSON {id, name, mimeType, webViewLink} for the created file (or an error string).
notes: Requires Google Workspace connected for the operator. `content` is uploaded as media (UTF-8). To create a folder, pass mime_type='application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and omit content. For rich Google Docs/Sheets/Slides authoring use create_doc / create_spreadsheet / create_presentation instead.
